zh: 足智多謀的，有解決問題能力的
en: She is very resourceful and can solve any problem.
en_example: She is very resourceful and can solve any problem.
zh_example: She is very resourceful and can solve any problem.
ja: 機転が利く、資源をうまく活用できる
ja_example: She is very resourceful and can solve any problem.

en: Albert Einstein was a scientific genius.
en_example: Albert Einstein was a scientific genius.
zh_example: Albert Einstein was a scientific genius.
ja: 天才、非常に優れた才能を持つ人
ja_example: Albert Einstein was a scientific genius.

en: The internet connection is very fast today.
en_example: The internet connection is very fast today.
zh_example: The internet connection is very fast today.
ja_example: The internet connection is very fast today.

en: We can stream videos online without downloading.
en_example: We can stream videos online without downloading.
zh_example: We can stream videos online without downloading.
ja: ストリーミング、データを連続的に送信すること
ja_example: We can stream videos online without downloading.

en: The phone call was breaking up due to poor signal.
en_example: The phone call was breaking up due to poor signal.
zh_example: The phone call was breaking up due to poor signal.
ja: 通信が途切れる、音声が途切れ途切れになる
ja_example: The phone call was breaking up due to poor signal.

en: She used her communication pad to send a message.
en_example: She used her communication pad to send a message.
zh_example: She used her communication pad to send a message.
ja_example: She used her communication pad to send a message.

en: The movie was shown on a big screen.
en_example: The movie was shown on a big screen.
zh_example: The movie was shown on a big screen.
ja_example: The movie was shown on a big screen.

en: They worked hard to free the trapped animal.
en_example: They worked hard to free the trapped animal.
zh_example: They worked hard to free the trapped animal.
ja_example: They worked hard to free the trapped animal.

en: Be careful when crossing the street.
